articles.title: John Strong and Stu Holden enjoy ‘wonderfully chaotic’ experience as Fox’ lead World Cup broadcasters
articles.description:
“That moment we take off our headsets after these big games, we exhale, because we love what we do and we get wrapped up in it,” Holden said.

The post John Strong and Stu Holden enjoy ‘wonderfully chaotic’ experience as Fox’ lead World Cup broadcasters appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Strong and Stu Holden are Fox's lead broadcasters for the 2026 World Cup.
Holden expressed excitement about the chaotic nature of live sports broadcasting.
Boston residents can expect enhanced coverage of the World Cup from local broadcasters.

articles.title: Tom Brady busy at Fanatics Fest, from a face slap to showing off his arm
articles.description:
Brady went viral after smacking Logan Paul’s face on Friday.

The post Tom Brady busy at Fanatics Fest, from a face slap to showing off his arm appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tom Brady went viral for slapping Logan Paul at Fanatics Fest on July 18.
Brady showcased his throwing skills, engaging fans at the event.
Local residents can expect increased interest in sports events featuring Brady.
